creator: stijn@win.tue.nl
text:
On Fri, Mar 09, 2001 at 05:29:01PM +0100, Jimmy Olgeni wrote:
> aargh. The xmame port can't fetch the "Mameinfo281.zip" file.
> 
> Is there a new version somewhere?

Yes, at http://www.mameworld.net/mameinfo/; however I'd like to propose to
drop support for this one. It's updated about once a week, so it would become
a committers nightmare :)

I didn't realize that when I added support for the datfiles. The other
ones are relatively static (ie, updated at the most when a new version of
MAME comes out).

I've attached a new version of the ports in question that drops support for
this file, and adds SDL support (which enables one to run xmame fullscreen
without root rights). It's a uuencoded shar archive because the patch was
bigger than this. All the changes made in the first version are of course
still in.

--Stijn

-- 
I wish there was a knob on the TV to turn up the intelligence.
There's a knob called `brightness', but it doesn't work."
		-- Gallagher
